lines.speaker: Sam
lines.text: Welcome to the Burthorpe Games Rooms!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I play board games?

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.text: You can someone to a game anywhere in the Games Zone (except on a PvP or Deadman world) by using the right click option.

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.text: Choose the type of game and then choose the option you want such as time per move.

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.text: If you opponent accepts the challenge you will be taken to one of the tables around where you will play your game of choice.

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.text: Once you have finished your game you will go back to the challenge room here where you can challenge again! We also have tables in a few pubs around the world!

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.text: Currently we offer Draughts, Runelink, Runesquares, and Runeversi.

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.text: Draughts uses standard rules, apart from: a draw is declared if no piece has been taken or promoted for forty moves.

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.text: Yup, you have to get four runes in row.

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.text: Yes, you take it in turns to add a line with the goal of making squares. Everytime you make a square you take another turn.

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.text: Yep, the aim is to have more of your runes on the board than your opponent. You can take your opponents pieces by trapping them between your own.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I buy a drink please?

lines.speaker: Sam
lines.text: I'm afraid I don't sell drinks.
